creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Aleks from comment #17)
This isn't actually a support forum, but now that we're here let's try one more time to figure it out:

 - Do you have any snapshots?
 - Another possibility is that you have an application that's writing to an unlinked file. There are any number of ways to diagnose that, but by far the simplest is to reboot the machine.
